raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":1.0,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.2":"The delegation to improve the draft centrally includes verifying logical consistency to ensure coherent flow from performance claims to method description and experiments.","R1.5":"Structural reorganization is load-bearing for the delegation, as the draft's disjointed paragraphs require better section-level ordering and narrative arc.","R1.6":"Writing polish is load-bearing to address the draft's run-on sentences, awkward phrasing, and improve overall readability and conciseness.","R1.7":"Citation and scholarship are central to the improvement by adding accurate references and ensuring proper attribution to prior baselines mentioned.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is centrally expected to preserve or enhance the draft's cautious language around indirect comparisons and performance beliefs.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggerating competitiveness against prior works in the improved draft.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is central to keep improvements focused on the described datasets, method, and evaluation without unwarranted expansions.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral but active to consider potential misuses of the hybrid retrieval approach in sensitive applications.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are peripheral but active to maintain links to the original draft content during improvements."}}

rationale.R1.2: The delegation to improve the draft centrally includes verifying logical consistency to ensure coherent flow from performance claims to method description and experiments.
rationale.R1.5: Structural reorganization is load-bearing for the delegation, as the draft's disjointed paragraphs require better section-level ordering and narrative arc.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is load-bearing to address the draft's run-on sentences, awkward phrasing, and improve overall readability and conciseness.
rationale.R1.7: Citation and scholarship are central to the improvement by adding accurate references and ensuring proper attribution to prior baselines mentioned.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is centrally expected to preserve or enhance the draft's cautious language around indirect comparisons and performance beliefs.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggerating competitiveness against prior works in the improved draft.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to keep improvements focused on the described datasets, method, and evaluation without unwarranted expansions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral but active to consider potential misuses of the hybrid retrieval approach in sensitive applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are peripheral but active to maintain links to the original draft content during improvements.
